title: Gems & Things
description: Adds a lot of things related to gems.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ff818b68fb7c22e3611194d22cf4602251e26af.png)

# By installing the modification, you will get a lot of different things related to gems.

**Mod Content**:
-Aquamarine (Block, Item, Dirty Variation)
-Chrysolite (Block, Item, Dirty Variation)
-Opal (Block, Object, Dirty Variation)
-Ruby (Block, Item, Dirty Variation)
-Incense of all kinds of gemstones (Ruby, Opal, Chrysolite, Aquamarine)
-Totems made of all kinds of gemstones (Ruby, Opal, Chrysolite, Aquamarine)
-Heavy Barrel
-Heavy barrels of all kinds of gemstones (Ruby, Opal, Chrysolite, Aquamarine)
